free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 26.5 MeV alpha
particles on Si-28, P-31 and S-32 nuclei
120 cm cyclotron.
Surface barrier detectors with n-type silicon
were used.
Four samples of each element were prepared. One sample
was used for angular distribution measurements, three
samples were used for for the determination of
absolute value of cross section.
No source of uncertainty is given.
Standard error of absolute cross section
determination.
Tables from report INP-699,1970.
SS+LV+On

gold backing (0.70 mg/cm2 thickness) were used.
